resources.string: Distributes member fees proportionally across active sport groups (Sparten) and shows totals per group as well as a per-member detail view.
No data found. Please check the plugin settings.
The plugin is not fully configured yet. Please select the sport group category and the fee profile field in the settings first.
Enables or disables the plugin entirely.
Only members of the selected roles can access this plugin. If no role is selected, all logged-in members have access.
Select the Admidio role category whose roles represent the sport groups used for proportional fee distribution.
Select the category of family roles. All members of a family role share one fee that is split equally. Leave empty if no family memberships are used.
Select the profile field that holds the membership fee as a number (e.g. "Beitrag" or "Annual fee").
